race.comment: MARSABIT (8) tough old gelding who finds a winnable race on the quick back-up. Massive jump in grade in the Heavy (9) going with a plugging seventh to Mawjood over 1500m at Rosehill in BM78 class last Saturday. Proven at the trip and can score a long overdue victory. CLASSIC DEEL (2) frustrating mare who ran an improved race second-up when sitting on the pace for a plugging fourth in the heavy conditions over 1870m at Newcastle. Senior rider goes on and gets map favours. JUST SHANE (3) came back to the country circuit where he savaged the line for a narrow third over 1600m at Queanbeyan in C3 class. Back to his home track and can race closer today. Place prospects best. EGYPTOLOGIST (4) just under a month between runs when he jumped in trip and grade for a tiring seventh over 2000m at Mudgee. Assess on the good win two-back at Wellington. Worth thought despite drawing out.
